verdict: Strong unit economics, but the campaign is paused and lead volume has collapsed to two.
diagnosis: Main search campaign is paused, killing impressions to zero this period despite a $12 cost per lead well under healthcare norms.

signals.headline: Search campaign paused, 0 latest impressions
signals.detail: The BWS Search Campaign shows PAUSED status. Latest period impressions and clicks are zero. Pipeline is starving.

signals.headline: Only 2 leads in 28 days
signals.detail: Lead volume is critically low for a medical group. Two leads will not feed a sales pipeline.

signals.headline: Cost per lead just $12
signals.detail: Cost per lead of $12.03 is far below medical category norms. The offer and targeting are working when ads run.

signals.headline: $5,897 in tracked purchases
signals.detail: Nine purchases generated nearly $5,900 in value on $1,249 spend. Return on ad spend is roughly 4.7 to 1.

signals.headline: Zero call clicks, 33 direction requests
signals.detail: Google Business Profile drove 33 direction requests but no phone calls. Call tracking or click-to-call placement may be broken.

market_context: {"benchmark": {"label": "Benchmark", "subheader": "Medical cost per lead averages $57 to $98", "body": "<cite index="6-8">Physicians and surgeons average $5 cost per click and $56.83 cost per lead in 2026.</cite> <cite index="3-13">Wellness business-to-consumer cost per lead starts around $98.</cite> Liferun sits well below both at $12."}, "seasonal": {"label": "Seasonal", "subheader": "Senior care demand steady into summer", "body": "<cite index="12-11">Expect aggressive expansion in home health and remote monitoring this year.</cite> Senior monitoring demand does not dip in late spring. Pausing the campaign now leaves leads on the table."}, "competitor": {"label": "Competitor", "subheader": "Rivals leaning into AI search and reviews", "body": "<cite index="14-24,14-25">AI platforms like ChatGPT and Google AI Overviews are becoming a primary discovery surface for patients researching providers.</cite> <cite index="20-34">Roughly 84% of patients read online reviews before choosing a provider.</cite>"}}

recommendations.title: Reactivate the paused search campaign immediately
recommendations.detail: The BWS Search Campaign is paused with strong economics. Consider relaunching with the same V4 ad and 'medical monitoring services' keyword before momentum decays further.

recommendations.title: Fix call tracking on Google Business Profile
recommendations.detail: Direction requests hit 33 but call clicks are zero. Test the phone number link, verify tracking, and confirm (800) 421-3366 is clickable on mobile.

recommendations.title: Test scaling spend to grow lead volume
recommendations.detail: With cost per lead at $12 and return on ad spend near 4.7 to 1, worth exploring a 50% budget increase once the campaign is live again.
